name: Hall of Guilds
description:
You have stepped into a grand and open entryway of the Hall of Guilds.  The
floors and walls are cobbled stone of superior workmanship than the surrounding
buildings of Bree.  The ceiling is open and you can see the thick wooden beams
supporting a simple roof.  There are two long tables along the eastern and
western walls with some uncomfortable looking wooden chairs arranged around
them for study.  Against the north wall stands a large bookshelf containing
various books and ledgers about guilds.  To the left of the bookshelf is an
arched doorway leading further into the hall.    
The only obvious exits are south and north.
